mapper.select: SELECT * FROM attendance_record WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND record_date = #{recordDate}
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_record SET emp_id = #{record.empId}, record_date = #{record.recordDate}, sign_in_time = #{record.signInTime}, sign_out_time = #{record.signOutTime}, work_hours = #{record.workHours}, status = #{record.status}, is_working_day = #{record.isWorkingDay}, remark = #{record.remark} WHERE record_id = #{record.recordId}
